title: Isodictyophorus defoliatus
taxonomy: Isodictyophorus defoliatus is a species of calcareous sponge, specifically belonging to the phylum Porifera. Within the phylum Porifera, Isodictyophorus defoliatus falls under the class Calcarea. The class Calcarea is further divided into the order Leucosolenida, where Isodictyophorus defoliatus is classified. The order Leucosolenida comprises several families, and Isodictyophorus defoliatus is a member of the family Leucosolenidae. Isodictyophorus defoliatus is further classified into the subfamily Sycettinae.
